parameters.query:
=SELECT s.business_name, s.domain, s.ghl_location_id, s.target_city, s.target_state,
       a.audit_date, a.scores, a.delta, a.core30_coverage,
       (SELECT count(*) FROM findings f WHERE f.audit_id = a.id AND f.status = 'open') as open_findings,
       (SELECT count(*) FROM findings f WHERE f.audit_id = a.id AND f.severity = 'critical' AND f.status = 'open') as critical_findings
FROM audits a
JOIN sites s ON s.id = a.site_id
WHERE a.id = '{{ $json.body.audit_id }}'
LIMIT 1
